game.name: jumper
game.description: A cooperative BitWorld platformer where players cross pits, stack on each other, and reach the flag.

tokens.description: One connection token per player slot, indexed by slot.

maxTicks.description: Maximum simulation ticks before starting a fresh game, where 0 means no tick limit.

maxGames.description: Maximum fresh games before shutdown, where 0 means no game limit.

readme.value:
# Jumper

Cooperative Coworld platformer where players cross pits, stack on each other, and reach the flag.

content.value:
# Jumper Rules

Players move through a side-scrolling platform level, cross pits, stack on each other when needed, and try to reach the flag. Falling below the level respawns the player. The smoke certification runs a short deterministic two-player episode.

# Play Jumper

Connect with the sprite protocol player websocket, move right through the level, jump over gaps and walls, and cooperate with other players to cross larger hazards. The bundled dalli player is a deterministic smoke-test bot for local certification.

reporter.name: Default Reporter
reporter.description: Default Coworld reporter for generic episode artifacts.

grader.name: BitWorld Score Grader
grader.description: Generic BitWorld grader that scores episode interest from score spread and game-specific activity signals.

variants.name: Freeplay
variants.description: Open-ended Jumper configuration for local player testing.

variants.name: Smoke
variants.description: Short deterministic Jumper configuration used for manifest checks.
